title: nephrodium filix-mas var. crenatum
intro: Nephrodium filix-mas var. crenatum, also known as the crenated male fern, is a variant of the male fern plant that is characterized by its distinctive leaf shape and serrated edges. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects that can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Nephrodium filix-mas var. crenatum include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a natural diuretic to help alleviate urinary problems. In herbal preparations, Nephrodium filix-mas var. crenatum is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
